tasks_completed.description: tool-policy.v1.json: added Skill to 9 codex-using roles + write-prefixes for ba/qa + policy_version=3 + _note acknowledgement

Sentinel-grant lifecycle (additive). New functions in hooks/lib/allowlist.py: load_sentinel_grant_for_task, match_sentinel_grant_for_bash_command (structural — never substring-matches), consume_sentinel_grant_on_terminal_result, reap_expired_sentinel_grants. userprompt-consent-allowlist.sh writes /tmp/claude-grants/<task_id>.json with structured allowed_operations[]. pretool-bash-safety.sh sentinel-aware short-circuit (CF-1: suppresses legacy when sentinel exists but does NOT structurally match — closes comment-only bypass). posttool-allowlist-consume.py Bash-only + match-required gating (CF-2). stop-cleanup-allowlist.sh reaps expired/malformed. 8 new test_* methods + CLAUDE.md Subagent Hook Discipline update.

hooks/push.sh Chain-B sentinel-file gate. Reads sentinel, requires result==PASS + all binding fields (request_id, head, branch, remote) as non-empty strings with exact equality (CF-3 fix), mtime<=60s, atomic unlink before any executable git verb. trap EXIT INT TERM. Unit test test_push_sentinel_abort.sh runs 5 fixtures (missing/expired/FAIL + CF-3 missing-fields + CF-3 head-mismatch).
commands/commit.md Step 7 rewritten as deterministic 4-stage fail-closed algorithm. Permissive regex matches verbatim real-world close-report line 151.

CF-2 (sentinel consumed by unrelated PostToolUse): in_scope_real_bug, APPLIED (Bash-only + match-required gating). CF-3 (Chain-B sentinel binding fields optional): in_scope_real_bug, APPLIED + 2 regression fixtures. CF-4 (no checked-in validator wrapper): out_of_scope — BA spec permits Option A self-abort alone; dev picked A. Logged observation_only.
codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: 3 BLOCKERS fixed with concrete code changes + 2 new regression test fixtures. 1 MAJOR (CF-4) classified out_of_scope.
